resources.string: Intercepts hardware Push-to-Talk keys (Samsung Active Key / keyCode 1015 on Samsung ruggedized devices; KEYCODE_PTT / 228 on Sonim XP10 / XP9900) to enable PTT while ATAK is in the background or the screen is off. Only these two specific keycodes are acted on; every other key passes through. Does not read screen content, typed text, viewed windows, or any other app data.
